sources.cleaned_content:
# FRA-BER KO IRON 4.54L Cleaner & Disinfectant For Body & Wheel

Images:
- https://www.gecegy.com/web/image/product.product/5311/image_1024/%5BCCCCXX00006%5D%20FRA-BER%20KO%20IRON%204.54L%20Cleaner%20%26%20Disinfectant%20For%20Body%20%26%20Wheel?unique=bc57b92
- https://www.gecegy.com/web/image/product.image/7150/image_1024/FRA-BER%20KO%20IRON%204.54L%20Wheel%26Body%20Cleaner%20And%20Disinfectant?unique=68bf933

#### Description:
FRA-BER KO IRON is a powerful acid-free cleaner and decontaminant specifically formulated to eliminate ferrous residues and limescale from both car bodywork and wheels. It's ideal for tackling the kind of deep-seated contamination that traditional rim cleaners can't reach.
This innovative product features a low-odor formula and delivers a striking purple color-change effect as it dissolves iron and rust particles, making the decontamination process not only effective but visually impressive.

#### Key Features:
- Effectively removes iron and mineral contaminants
- Creates a purple color reaction upon contact with iron
- Safe for use on steel, alloy, chrome, and polished rims
- Acid-free, low sulfur odor formula
- Suitable for cars, vans, trucks, and motorcycles
- Cleans both body panels and wheels

#### Directions for Use:
- Use pure on rusted metal or dilute 1:1 or 1:2 for light contamination.
- Spray directly onto a clean, cool surface.
- Allow the product to react and turn purple.
- Do not let it dry. Rinse thoroughly with water.

Warning: Always test on a small, inconspicuous area before use. Avoid applying on hot surfaces. Prevent contact with cast iron brake calipers.

Price: 1,150.00 EGP

Internal Reference: CCCCXX00006

Category: Exterior Chemicals > Tires & Rims

## Product Description

Fra-Ber Ko Iron | 4.54L Professional | Ferrous Decontaminant | Violet Visual Effect | Concentrated Gel Formula

Fra-Ber Ko Iron 4.54L is a high-capacity professional ferrous decontaminant specially developed for intensive use in body shops, detailing centers, and commercial applications. This professional version offers maximum efficiency in removing iron particles, rust, brake dust, and mineral deposits accumulated on the body, wheels, and glass, providing significant savings for users who process multiple vehicles.

With an advanced concentrated gel formula, Ko Iron 4.54L effectively removes even the most stubborn stains that conventional washing can remove. The distinct violet visual effect clearly indicates ferrous contamination, ensuring thorough and precise cleaning with every application. The large-volume packaging offers superior performance and a lower cost per application, making it ideal for professionals who value efficiency and savings.

Main Features:
- Professional packaging 4.54L – optimized volume for intensive use
- Advanced Iron Remover – Eliminates brake dust, rust and pollution
- Violet visual effect – clear indication of ferrous contamination
- Concentrated gel formula – superior adhesion and extended action time
- Professional income – significant savings per application
- Low odor – formula with less sulfur smell
- Cherry aroma – pleasant experience during use
- Total versatility – wheels, bodywork, glass and plastics
- Fra-Ber Quality – Italian professional reference brand

Technical Specifications:
- Product: Fra-Ber Professional Ferrous Decontaminant
- Model: Ko Iron
- Content: 4.54 Liters (professional format)
- Code: 700210
- Type: Iron Remover / Ferrous Decontaminant
- Application: Vehicle exterior (professional use)
- Surfaces: Wheels, bodywork, glass, plastics
- Format: Professional refill packaging
- Concentration: Concentrated gel formula
- Yield: Approximately 90-180 applications (depending on dilution)
- Storage: Cool, dry place
- Validity: See original packaging

Advantages of the 4.54L Professional Version:

Operational Economy:
- Reduced cost per application - savings of up to 40% vs. small packaging
- Higher yield - up to 180 applications depending on dilution
- Fewer replenishments - stock optimized for intensive use
- Efficient packaging - less material waste
- Improved ROI - superior return on investment

Professional Efficiency:
- Intensive use - suitable for multiple daily vehicles
- Consistency - same quality in large volumes
- Versatility - multiple dilutions as needed
- Practicality - refilling sprayers
- Productivity - less time wasted on replenishments

Detailed Professional Applications:

Detailing Centers:
- Pre-polishing preparation - removal of ferrous contaminants
- Complete decontamination - before applying coatings
- Premium wheel cleaning - without damaging delicate finishes
- Fleet maintenance - efficient processing of multiple vehicles
- Specialized services - catering and preparation for competitions

Mechanical Workshops:
- Post-repair cleaning - removal of welding residues
- Brake maintenance - cleaning accumulated dust
- Preparation for painting - decontamination before priming
- Cleaning of components - exposed metal parts
- Washing services - complement to basic services

Professional Car Wash:
- Premium service - competitive differentiation
- Specialized packages - decontamination as an extra
- Preventive maintenance - protection against oxidation
- Demanding customers - luxury and sports vehicles
- Fidelity - visible results that impress

Professional Dilution Instructions:

Light Contamination (1:2):
- Mixture: 1.5L Ko Iron + 3L water = 4.5L solution
- Applications: ~90 vehicles
- Usage: Regular maintenance, light dusting
- Action time: 2-3 minutes

Moderate Contamination (1:1):
- Mixture: 2.27L Ko Iron + 2.27L water = 4.54L solution
- Applications: ~60 vehicles
- Use: Brake dust, urban pollution
- Action time: 3-4 minutes

Heavy Contamination (Pure):
- Mixture: 4.54L Ko Pure Iron
- Applications: ~45 vehicles
- Use: Rust, severe contamination
- Action time: 4-5 minutes

Who is it recommended for?
- Professional detailing centers - daily intensive use
- Specialized mechanical workshops - quality services
- Premium car wash - competitive differentiation
- Vehicle tuners - competitions and exhibitions
- Corporate fleets - preventive maintenance
- Product distributors - professional resale
- Mobile detailers - operational savings
- Detailing schools - professional training

Professional Use Protocol:

Preparation:
- Check temperature - cold surface, no sun exposure
- Prepare equipment - sprayers, brushes, hose
- Protective equipment - gloves, glasses, suitable clothing
- Dilute as needed - assess contamination level

Systematic Application:
- Preliminary test - small area to check reaction
- Uniform application - complete surface coverage
- Controlled action time - 2-5 minutes depending on contamination
- Observation of the violet effect - visual indicator of effectiveness
- Agitation if necessary - soft brush in severe cases

Finalization:
- Rinse thoroughly - complete removal of the product
- Result verification - detailed visual inspection
- Repeat if necessary - until complete elimination of contamination
- Proper drying - preparation for next steps

Inventory Management:
- Proper storage - cool, dry and ventilated place
- Temperature control - avoid thermal extremes
- Inventory turnover - FIFO (First In, First Out)
- Usage record - consumption and income control

Professional Compatibility:

Luxury Vehicles: Mercedes-Benz (S-Class, Maybach), BMW (7 Series, X7), Audi (A8, Q8), Porsche (Panamera, Cayenne), Jaguar (XJ, F-Pace)

Commercial Fleets: Rent-a-car (preventive maintenance), Corporate fleets (corporate image), Representation vehicles (impeccable presentation), Executive transport (premium standard)

Special Vehicles: Classics and collections (specialized care), Sports (preparation for events), Modified (maintenance of special components), Competition (specialized technical cleaning)

Professional Precautions:

Operational Safety:
- Mandatory PPE - gloves, glasses, appropriate clothing
- Adequate ventilation - well-ventilated spaces
- First aid kit available on site
- Staff training - correct and safe use

Professional Storage:
- Suitable location - cool, dry, ventilated
- Signage - clear product identification
- Controlled access - authorized personnel only
- Movement record - stock control

Responsible Disposal:
- Local legislation - environmental compliance
- Neutralization - if necessary before disposal
- Empty packaging - proper recycling
- Documentation - disposal records

Professional Packaging Contents:
Included:
- 1x Fra-Ber Ko Iron 4.54L - professional packaging
- Original packaging - with all technical information
- Safety data sheet - detailed information
- Instructions for use - professional protocol

Not Included (purchase separately):
- Sprayers - for diluted application
- Protective equipment - gloves, glasses
- Application brushes - for severe cases
- Meters - for precise dilutions

IMPORTANT: The 4.54L professional version of the Fra-Ber Ko Iron offers maximum savings and efficiency for heavy users. It requires proper storage and responsible use as per the safety data sheet. Ideal for detailing centers, workshops, and car washes that process multiple vehicles daily, providing significant savings and consistent professional results.

## Specifications
- Mark: Fra-ber
- Product type: Decontamination
- Weight: 5.0 kg

# FRA-BER KO IRON 4.54L

Car iron remover designed to eliminate iron and mineral residues that are challenging to remove with regular cleaners.

- Field of application: various car surfaces such as rims, bodywork and windows.
- Effectively eliminates iron deposits from brake pads, city pollution, rail dust, and acid rain.
- Colour indication: it turns purple when it contacts iron micro-particles and rust.
- Gel formula: highly concentrated for better adhesion and performance on vertical surfaces.
- Low odour: with a low-sulphur-odour formula for easier close-range application.
- Cherry fragrance: leaves a pleasant cherry scent after each use.

SKU: 340261
BARCODE: 8027486807116
4 PCS/BOX

Additional Information:
Ko Iron by Fra-Ber is a specialized car iron remover designed to eliminate iron and mineral residues that regular cleaners struggle to remove. It is suitable for use on various car surfaces, including rims, bodywork, and windows.
The product efficiently removes iron deposits from brake pads, city pollution, rail dust, and acid rain. It features a unique colour-changing effect that turns purple when it comes into contact with iron micro-particles and rust, providing a visual indication of its action.

Application tips: For rust, use the product in its pure form. For surfaces contaminated with iron, dilute it to a ratio between 1:1 and 1:2. Do not allow the product to dry and avoid applying it in direct sunlight or on hot surfaces.

Downloadable Files:
- Safety Data Sheet: https://www.patriotis.com/Attachment/DownloadFile?downloadGuid=50142f39-fce6-470e-bb72-87d30e76f443
- Technical Data Sheet: https://www.patriotis.com/Attachment/DownloadFile?downloadGuid=4de8f695-7be8-4b37-9b29-c446717e45bd

# Ko Iron

Decontaminant for ferrous residues and limestone

Ko Iron is a car iron remover that removes iron and mineral residue otherwise difficult to tackle with a normal cleaner. It can be used on different car surfaces including rims, bodywork and windows.

Image: https://www.fra-ber.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/ko-iron-di-fra-ber-819x1024.jpg

The main features:
- Iron remover: suitable for removing iron left by brake pads, city pollution, rail dust and acid rain.
- Color change: creates a special visual effect that turns purple in the presence of microparticles of iron and rust.
- Gel formula: it comes in a highly concentrated format for better adhesion and performance on vertical surfaces.
- Low odour: the low-sulphur-odour formula is designed to make it easier to work at close range.
- Cherry fragrance: it leaves a pleasant scent after each application.

### Directions for use
Spray the product pure to treat highly contaminated surfaces, or diluted in water in a ratio of 1:1 / 1:2 for lightly contaminated surfaces. For heavy-duty dirt, use a brush or glove. Wait for the product to react and change colour (2-3 minutes), then rinse. Do not apply the product on hot surfaces and do not let it dry.

### Warnings
Do not allow the product to dry and do not apply in the sun and on hot surfaces. On delicate surfaces, a spot test should always be performed before use. Avoid contact between the product and the cast iron brake calliper.

#### Formats and article codes
Format: 4,54 L - Item Code: 700210 - Box: 4 pcs
